title: Framed
description: Framed is a creative utility mod designed to enhance visual control and presentation in Minecraft.
body:
![Framed Banner](https://i.imgur.com/UTy1O7t.png)

A lightweight toolkit for Minecraft content creators.
Paperdoll. Cinema Bars. Your content, framed.

*** ## Features ### 🎭 Paperdoll A fully configurable on-screen player model — like a VTuber avatar for Minecraft. - **Positioning** — Place it anywhere on screen that stay consistent across resolutions and GUI scales. - **Scalable** — Adjust the size to fit your overlay without it getting in the way. - **Head tracking** — Smooth head movement with configurable yaw and limit so it feels alive, not stiff. ![Paperdoll Preview](https://i.imgur.com/cVenmVM.gif) ### 🎬 Cinema Bars Instantly add cinematic letterbox bars to your gameplay. - **Toggle or hold** — Use toggle mode for permanent cinematic vibes, or hold mode for quick dramatic moments. - **Custom aspect ratio** — From ultrawide 2.39:1 to classic 16:9, dial in the exact look you want. - **Smooth animation** — Bars slide in and out with configurable animation speed. ![Cinema Bars Preview](https://i.imgur.com/dsJC7I6.gif) ### ⚙️ In-Game Config Everything is configurable through a clean, built-in settings screen — no external files to edit. Includes a **live preview** so you can see your changes in real time. ![Config Screen Preview](https://i.imgur.com/jYSCIqg.png) *** ## Keybinds | Action | Default Key | |--------|-------------| | Toggle Cinema Bars | *Configurable in Controls* | *** ## Frequently Asked Questions **Q: Does this work on servers?** **A:** Framed is **100% client-side**. No server installation needed — just drop it in your mods folder and go. **Q: Can I use this in my modpack or videos?** **A:** Of course! Just credit the mod and don't claim it as your own. *** ## Planned Features - 🎥 Clean HUD toggle (hide all vanilla UI with one key) - 📷 Camera presets (save & switch between configurations) - 🔍 Smooth zoom with customizable easing Have a suggestion? Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/23b6vpSm8v) and let us know! ***

Framed is not affiliated with Mojang or Minecraft.

Minecraft is a trademark of Mojang Synergies AB

Made with 💙 by LunazStudios
